name: Robert Jacobs
summary: Former U.S. Air Force officer who has claimed that film of a 1964 missile test showed an unidentified object interacting with the test vehicle.
profileStatus: Former military photographic officer and claimant
profileSummary: Former U.S. Air Force officer who has claimed that film of a 1964 missile test showed an unidentified object interacting with the test vehicle.
background: Former U.S. Air Force photographic instrumentation officer.
inclusionNote: Included because he was a named participant in the missile-test program and has maintained a detailed public account. The interpretation of the film is disputed.

primarySourceLinks.label: Background on the Big Sur film claim
